name.full: MCAPS-IQ — AI Sales Operations Agent for MCAPS Account Teams

description.short: AI-powered sales operations agent for MCAPS account teams
description.full: MCAPS-IQ strengthens cross-role communication and strategic alignment across CRM, M365, and knowledge sources. Supports Specialist, Solution Engineer, CSA, and CSAM workflows through the MCEM lifecycle — from pipeline qualification through value realization.
